issue.title: map.naver.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://map.naver.com/p?c=15.00,0,0,0,adh&p=G8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg,161.84,10,90,0,0,Float](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmap.naver.com%2Fp%3Fc%3D15.00%2C0%2C0%2C0%2Cadh%26p%3DG8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg%2C161.84%2C10%2C90%2C0%2C0%2CFloat) ### Comment > 언제부턴가 해당 확장프로그렘이 켜져있을때 > 네이버지도에서 로드뷰를 보려고하면 화면이 멈추고 스크린샷과같이 오류가 뜹니다. > 사이트를 새로고침하거나 해당 프로그램을 비활성화를 하면 정상작동됩니다. > > 처음에는 로드뷰를 쓰기 어려울만큼 버벅임과 로드뷰 화질저화등이 발생했는데 > 이 확장프로그램에서 몇가지 설정 변경 후 화질개선과 버벅거림은 없어졌지만 > 첫 실행시 오류가 뜨는건 바뀌지않아요. > 네이버지도 로드뷰 관련 프로그램을 차단하는거같은데 수정부탁드립니다. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/nbbifrcvywgsks80s44cwo804sc0gcwcu7ttg67gbk.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/li7hxnx6q1skcck4s8kkk0wcwkg044wctxta2icodw.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.4.3.49 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

**Language-specific:**

issue.title: [False Negative]: add 12 phishing domains (go-trust[.]co[.]com, app[.]conigecko[.]live, ...)
issue.body:
> [!IMPORTANT] > ## Executive Summary > > This report documents 12 domain(s) that have been identified as part of active phishing operations. These domains exhibit characteristics consistent with malicious infrastructure and pose an immediate security risk to internet users. The following 12 domain(s) have been analyzed and confirmed as participating in phishing campaign(s): ``` go-trust.co.com app.conigecko.live simpleswapp.com 1lnch.fi-v2.to phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to rabby.fi-v2.to soiflare.fi-v2.to sunswap.nexus fusebox-elavon.org elevon-payment.com suitee-trezorrsuite.com trezorsafety.com ``` ## Threat Analysis ### Phishing Attack Details These domains are part of a phishing campaign targeting cryptocurrency companies and cryptocurrency holders/investors. Attackers may use fake login pages, fake Web3 wallet connection prompts, fake cryptocurrency exchange/swap interfaces, or modified/malicious software to steal cryptocurrency seed phrases/keys. ### Technical Details - Cloaked. This means: if a request does not meet certain internal rules of the attacker, the request may be redirected to a non-existent subdomain "www.www.", a legitimate website, or display various HTTP errors such as 403, 404, 502, etc., SSL certificate errors, infinite loading, or a fake Cloudflare (or other service) CAPTCHA, or show content distinguishable from the phishing page. ### Detections & Targeted Brands - `go-trust.co.com` targets Trust Wallet (trustwallet.com) - VirusTotal: **0 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/go-trust.co.com/detection - Listed on Spamhaus - https://check.spamhaus.org/results/?query=go-trust.co.com - `app.conigecko.live` targets CoinGecko (coingecko.com) - VirusTotal: **2 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/app.conigecko.live/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=app.conigecko.live - `simpleswapp.com` targets SimpleSwap (simpleswap.io) - VirusTotal: **4 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/simpleswapp.com/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=simpleswapp.com - `1lnch.fi-v2.to` targets 1inch (1inch.io) - VirusTotal: **12 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/1lnch.fi-v2.to/detection - `phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to` targets Phantom Wallet (phantom.com) - VirusTotal: **16 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=phanton-wallet.fi-v2.to - `rabby.fi-v2.to` targets Rabby Wallet (rabby.io) - VirusTotal: **10 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/rabby.fi-v2.to/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=rabby.fi-v2.to - `soiflare.fi-v2.to` targets Solflare (solflare.com) - VirusTotal: **11 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/soiflare.fi-v2.to/detection - `sunswap.nexus` targets SunSwap (sun.io) - VirusTotal: **1 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/sunswap.nexus/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=sunswap.nexus - `fusebox-elavon.org` targets Fusebox Elavon (fusebox.elavon.net) - VirusTotal: **2 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/fusebox-elavon.org/detection - Listed on Spamhaus - https://check.spamhaus.org/results/?query=fusebox-elavon.org - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=fusebox-elavon.org - `elevon-payment.com` targets Fusebox Elavon (fusebox.elavon.net) - VirusTotal: **0 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/elevon-payment.com/detection - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=elevon-payment.com - `suitee-trezorrsuite.com` targets Trezor Wallet (trezor.io) - VirusTotal: **14 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/suitee-trezorrsuite.com/detection - Listed on Spamhaus - https://check.spamhaus.org/results/?query=suitee-trezorrsuite.com - `trezorsafety.com` targets Trezor Wallet (trezor.io) - VirusTotal: **18 detections** - https://www.virustotal.com/gui/domain/trezorsafety.com/detection - Listed on Spamhaus - https://check.spamhaus.org/results/?query=trezorsafety.com - Listed on APVA - https://api.antiphish.org/v1/lookup?host=trezorsafety.com ### Diagrams

issue.title: az1.zona.pub
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://az1.zona.pub/?ref=share](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Faz1.zona.pub%2F%3Fref%3Dshare) ### Comment > Здравствуйте, после 1 запуска Zona любой фильм или сериал источник спокойно включается, но стоит выйти из него и ещё включить его или любой другой ИСТОЧНИК появляется предупреждение чтоб выключил блокировки рекламы. Приходится принудительно через настройки закрывать Zona и ещё раз открывать и также тоже самое 1 запуск нормально, потом всё также. На компьютере с Zona и adguard таких проблем вообще нет. Менял DNS, он также баннер показывает чтоб выключил блокировки рекламы, либо вообще ничего не открывает. Исправьте ситуацию 🙏 (на скриншотах как смог всё изложил по полочкам). ### Screenshots

comment.body: > [@Sotcellular](https://github.com/Sotcellular) Проверьте по очереди > > * с выключенным "Блокировкой рекламы" (первый пункт) во вкладке с щитом > * с выключенной защитой DNS > > После сообщения про блокировщик фильм стартует? Проверил по очереди, результат на СКРИНШОТАХ прилагаю, в итоге ничего не поменялось, всё как было так и осталось. После сообщения фильм стартует, но приходится 1 минут ждать, пока он 3 раза покажет сообщения чтоб выключил блокировщик рекламы.

issue.title: memory-alpha.fandom.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

issue.title: myshows.me

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://myshows.me/profile/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmyshows.me%2Fprofile%2F) ### Comment > зареган на сайте. > захожу по ссылке https://myshows.me/profile/ , сайт переходит на https://myshows.me/profile/#released, страница загружается, показывает ошибку "что-то пошло не так" и начинает бешено и бесконечно перезагружаться раз в секунду, регулярно показывая ошибку "что-то пошло не так". После временного отключения adguard и загрузки рекламы сайт некоторое время загружается и работает нормально (может быть, до устаревания рекламы в каком-то кэше?), а потом (допустим, через день) всё начинается опять. > Ссылка на видео https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cQxcuOKvwdKlNMUUmmscrzbrLQV978vw/view?usp=sharing ``` Username: @evil-raider ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/tnt6gd74qv400gk8o4sgk0o48o0ok48noe7jcnj2og.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/9ka678dl8ug4c04o4go80wowk8wow0chvprj4okke0.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.9 (5282) System version: | `Windows 11 Pro 25H2 26200.8655` Browser: | vivaldi License type: | paid AdGuard driver: | WFP Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
